name: @affino/datagrid-vue-app-enterprise
author: Anton Pavlov <a.pavlov@affino.dev>
description: Enterprise app facade for Affino DataGrid Vue

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue-app build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-diagnostics-enterprise build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-formula-engine-enterprise build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue-app build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-diagnostics-enterprise build && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-formula-engine-enterprise build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm run type-check && pnpm run test:unit
